name: a429Transmit
title: a429Transmit
description: This function triggers the transfer of myNum A429words to the network hardware interface at once. When the mode Simulated bus is used, a built-in simulation layer takes care of the ARINC word.
Note that the ARINC word selector Gap (see a429SetGap) may be used to adjust the distance between the ARINC words. A single ARINC word is transmitted or updated with output.
Attention: Be aware that the hardware queue size is limited; therefore calling this method rapidly may cause a queue overflow.

parameters.name: myNum
parameters.description: [1...64] number of elements to be sent from myA429word

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
